prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023–2025年理科最低位次分别为73→60→77名，波动区间60–77名，2025年基准位次约77名；近三年位次在60–77之间窄幅震荡，未出现明显单边趋势；该校在新疆理科招生计划2023–2026年均为1人，连续四年保持不变，无扩招或缩招信号，竞争格局在计划端无变化。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海交通大学医学院隶属上海交通大 学（985/211/双一流），软科主榜参考上海交通大学排名第4（2026年），属全国顶尖高校层次，对考生有极强吸引力；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及校本 部学术不端与师德师风事件，但医学院独立办学，直接影响有限；抖音热度总排名第42（较热），整体关注度较高；2021年曾出现河南投档线异常信号，但近年无相关记录；临床医学（A+）、口腔医学（A+）、护理学（A-）、生物医学工程（A），其中临床医学为招生专业对应学科，学科评估全国顶尖，对高分考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学专业2024年热度指数70.19（推荐），2023年76.03（高热推荐），近年持续偏热；新疆2026年普通高考总人数约23.8万（不确定标记），；上海交通大学医学院2025年在新疆招生 仅1人，占该校全国总招生490人的0.2%，属极小比例投放；上海作为一线城市对边疆考生有较强吸引力，地域偏好正面。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合招生计划连续四年持平、临床医学 专业持续高热、新疆考生规模大幅增长、在2025年基准位次77名基础上预计位次小幅后移；预测最低位次约82名，区间72–92名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 上海交通大学医学院在新疆理科仅投放临床医学（八年制本博连读）一个专业，无分档选择空间。位次在预测区间72–92名内可尝试冲刺，位次明显优于区间下限（如70名以内） 则录取概率较高。该专业为临床医学A+学科，八年制本博连读培养模式，社会热度极高，建议高分考生优先考虑。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum science rankings were 73 → 60 → 77, fluctuating within the range of 60–77. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 77. Over the past three years, rankings have oscillated narrowly between 60 and 77 without a clear unilateral trend. The university's enrollment plan in Xinjiang for science has been 1 student per year from 2023 to 2026, remaining unchanged for four consecutive years, with no signals of expansion or contraction, indicating no change in competition structure on the plan side.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine is affiliated with Shanghai Jiao Tong University (985/211/Double First-Class). On the Soft Science main ranking, Shanghai Jiao Tong University is ranked 4th (2026), placing it among the top-tier universities nationwide, which strongly attracts high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct and teacher ethics incidents at the main campus, but the School of Medicine operates independently, so the direct impact is limited. Douyin popularity ranks 42nd overall (relatively hot), indicating high overall attention. In 2021, there was an abnormal signal in the Henan admission cutoff, but no related records in recent years. Disciplines include Clinical Medicine (A+), Stomatology (A+), Nursing (A-), and Biomedical Engineering (A). Clinical Medicine corresponds to the enrollment major and is nationally top-ranked in discipline evaluation, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Clinical Medicine major had a popularity index of 70.19 (recommended) in 2024 and 76.03 (highly recommended) in 2023, remaining consistently hot in recent years. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Xinjiang is approximately 238,000 (marked as uncertain). Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine enrolls only 1 student in Xinjiang in 2025, accounting for 0.2% of its total national enrollment of 490, representing a very small proportion. Shanghai, as a first-tier city, strongly attracts candidates from border regions, with a positive regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the unchanged enrollment plan for four consecutive years, the sustained high popularity of the Clinical Medicine major, the significant increase in the number of candidates in Xinjiang, and the baseline ranking of 77 in 2025, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 82, with a range of 72–92.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2: None (The university only offers one major in Xinjiang for science)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3: None (The university only offers one major in Xinjiang for science)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine only offers one major, Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year MD Program), in Xinjiang for science, leaving no room for tier selection. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 72–92 can attempt to apply, while those with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 70) have a higher probability of admission. This major is a Clinical Medicine A+ discipline with an eight-year MD training model and extremely high social popularity. It is recommended that high-scoring candidates prioritize it.
